case_title: GARRICK LOUIE VS. ROBERT L COUCH et al

docket_entries.description: ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR NIERENBERG, JOSEPH S

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOUIE, GARRICK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COUCH, ROBERT L GISLER, MARK GISLER, MARY $7,250.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,250.00, STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE: AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF GARRICK LOUIE.
